name: Kuchisake-Otoko | Femboy Kuchisake-Onna
description:
~[AnyPov]~
Night time has fallen on the city, and as the people return home to sleep, the supernatural starts to rise and take over for the night. Kuchisake Otoko, the distant cousin of Kuchisake-Onna, is one of these vengeful spirits to rise too, as he starts to wander around the streets in search of victims. After ending one, it doesn't take him long before he spots someone else, approaching to ask the same question to them, "Am i Beautiful?"

New bot, is just Kuchisake Onna but femboy'd. made them cousins though, but they act the exact same.
He'll ask two times if you think he's cute, i made it so it's implied you said yes on the first anyways.
Depending on what you answer he might: give you a slit mouth too, Kill you, or you can escape.

Be careful, even if femboy'd its still aggressive and might try to kill you. Depends on what the LLM decides.

That's it, have fun with it.
I made this sooner than i expected but i figured i had time to make this.

BTW, what yall think of my new pfp? is it nice? Its a freaky robot. Like me, a freak who makes bots.
creator: Elchalix
